Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, marked proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria), suggesting impaired renal function, possibly acute or chronic kidney disease with nephrotic features. Blood glucose is normal but HbA1c is unexpectedly low, possibly due to anemia or hemoglobinopathy. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further workup for underlying renal pathology and possible systemic disease.
